task_completion.description: Android Studio is launched and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Android Studio welcome screen or main IDE window is displayed.

task_completion.description: The SunflowerApp project is opened in Android Studio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project name 'SunflowerApp' is visible in the Android Studio title bar or the Project tool window.

task_completion.description: The project is trusted by the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Trust Project' dialog is shown being accepted, or Gradle sync has started/completed (which implies the project was trusted).
The 'Sync' or 'Build' tool window shows a successful sync (e.g., 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL', green checkmarks), and there are no active progress bars at the bottom right.

task_completion.description: The project structure is fully loaded and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Project tool window on the left displays the resolved Android project structure, showing folders like 'app', 'java', or 'res'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Android Studio GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Android Studio interface being used, rather than terminal commands simulating the process.

integrity.description: The opened project is the genuine SunflowerApp.
integrity.visual_evidence: The project view or editor shows files related to SunflowerApp (e.g., 'com.google.samples.apps.sunflower' package, 'Plant.kt'), not an empty or newly created project.

integrity.description: The Gradle sync was genuinely executed by Android Studio.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Android Studio Build/Sync output window shows authentic Gradle output, not a mocked text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at '/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/SunflowerApp'. The expected project name is 'SunflowerApp' and the package is 'com.google.samples.apps.sunflower'. A successful import will show this project name and package in the Android Studio project structure. The project uses Android Gradle Plugin 8.2.0 and Kotlin 1.9.22.
